prompt: Create a vertical fantasy glamour portrait of an ethereal young East Asian woman from the chest up, centered and facing forward with a calm, slightly melancholic expression, luminous pale skin, large glossy eyes, soft pink eyeshadow, rosy cheeks, and natural pink lips. She wears an off-shoulder black lace gown with delicate floral appliqué, her right hand gently touching her collarbone, shoulders bare and softly lit. Her dark hair expands upward and outward into an elaborate cosmic floral headdress made of translucent smoky ribbons, black lace-like petals, stardust, and warm golden spark particles against a deep midnight-blue and black background. Include exactly 20 prominent visible blossoms: 1 blurred mauve flower at the upper left, 2 small pink flowers on the left side, 1 glowing white flower near the left hairline, 1 tiny white flower near her left cheek, 1 central lavender flower above her forehead, 1 pink flower at the top center, 1 small dark flower just right of center, 2 large dark purple flowers on the right side of the hair, 4 small pink blossoms scattered on the right, 2 small blossoms in the lower-right background, and 3 dark floral appliqué blossoms on the dress. Use black plum, deep violet, dusty pink, and pale lavender with sparkling amber highlights. The mood should be dreamlike, mysterious, celestial, and romantic. Lighting should be cinematic low-key with a soft key light on the face, glowing bokeh embers, blue star points, and a warm misty flare from the lower left. Render in ultra-detailed photorealistic fantasy style, shallow depth of field, intricate hair strands, translucent veils, glittering dust, high contrast, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
